data.content: Hardened Knots state rollback updates: backend update() now uses raw knots state with a fallback to current display state when deciding non-adjacent transitions, so backward moves still send --force even if metadata.knotsState is missing. Added regression test coverage in knots-backend.test for missing raw-state rollback forcing. Validation: lint, typecheck, full unit tests, and production build (NODE_ENV=production).
